content.json:
# mdk - tenant ops workbook (per-tenant slice)

**Persona:** tenant operator / customer-success ("is **this tenant** healthy right now?").

Slices the runtime golden signals to a **single tenant** selected from the dropdown above. The dropdown is populated by a `distinct` KQL query against `AppMetrics.Properties.tenant`. All charts filter by `tenant == "{Tenant}"` so the panels are scoped.

**Cross-surface.** Grafana equivalent: `dashboards/grafana/mdk-runtime-overview.json` (the `$tenant` template variable). Choose this workbook when on a Portal-shared screen with the customer; Grafana when you need quick trace links.

_Caveat:_ `mdk.job.duration_ms` does **not** carry the `tenant` attribute today (only `kind` + `status`), so the latency panels below derive p95 from the `agent.execute` span `DurationMs` filtered by `Properties.tenant_id` instead - that's the per-tenant signal that exists.

_ADR refs: ADR 020, ADR 031 D2._

parameters.name: Tenant
parameters.label: Tenant
parameters.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.jobs.completed"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| where isnotempty(tenant)
| summarize by tenant
| order by tenant asc

content.json:
## 1. Requests (tenant)

**What.** Per-tenant job completion rate by `status` from `mdk.jobs.completed`.

**Normal.** Steady `success`; `error` < 1%; `dead_letter` = 0.

**If red, do.** Any spike outside the steady-state mix -> jump to the recent-failures panel below; in parallel, check whether the **`*-availability-no-traffic`** alert fired (fleet-wide today; per-tenant variant deferred).

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.jobs.completed"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"]), status = tostring(Properties["status"])
| where tenant == "{Tenant}"
| summarize Jobs = sum(Sum) by status, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: mdk.jobs.completed for {Tenant} by status (5m bins)

content.json:
## 2. Latency (tenant)

**What.** `agent.execute` p50/p95/p99 from `AppDependencies` filtered to this tenant (via `Properties.tenant_id` carried on the span; `mdk.job.duration_ms` metric instrument is **not** keyed on tenant - see caveat at the top of this workbook).

**Normal.** p95 < 2000 ms; p99 < 5000 ms.

**If red, do.**
- p95 > 5000 ms -> jump to Application Insights transaction search with `operation_Name == 'agent.execute'` and `customDimensions.tenant_id == '{Tenant}'`.
- p95 > 30000 ms -> the **`*-high-latency-p95`** SLO is firing fleet-wide; correlate.

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "agent.execute" and AppRoleName == "movate-runtime"
| extend tenant_id = tostring(Properties["tenant_id"])
| where tenant_id == "{Tenant}"
| summarize p50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50), p95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95), p99 = percentile(DurationMs, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: agent.execute p50 / p95 / p99 for {Tenant} (ms, 5m bins)

content.json:
## 3. Errors (tenant)

**What.** Failed `agent.execute` for this tenant, plus the failure-fraction time-series.

**Normal.** Error fraction < 1%; failures table sparse.

**If red, do.**
- error fraction > 10% (matches **`*-high-error-rate`** SLO threshold) -> pull the top `ResultCode` from the failures table; cross-check provider status.
- failures clustered after a deploy -> use the platform workbook to verify revision health and consider revert.

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "agent.execute" and AppRoleName == "movate-runtime"
| extend tenant_id = tostring(Properties["tenant_id"])
| where tenant_id == "{Tenant}"
| summarize Total = count(), Failed = countif(Success == false) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend ErrorPct = iff(Total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * Failed / Total, 2))
| project TimeGenerated, ErrorPct
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: agent.execute error % for {Tenant} (5m bins; SLO line at 10%)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "agent.execute" and AppRoleName == "movate-runtime" and Success == false
| extend tenant_id = tostring(Properties["tenant_id"])
| where tenant_id == "{Tenant}"
| project TimeGenerated, DurationMs, ResultCode, OperationId, Properties
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent failed agent.execute for {Tenant}

content.json:
## 4. Cost & tokens (tenant)

**What.** Per-tenant LLM spend and token volume from `mdk.run.cost_usd` / `mdk.run.tokens`.

**Normal.** Proportional to throughput; USD/1k stable.

**If red, do.** Sudden cost spike with throughput flat -> use the platform workbook's USD/1k chart to confirm provider price / model swap; otherwise inspect this tenant's `agent.execute` traces for prompt drift via Langfuse.

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.run.cost_usd"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| where tenant == "{Tenant}"
| summarize USD = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cost USD for {Tenant} (15m bins)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.run.tokens"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| where tenant == "{Tenant}"
| summarize Tokens = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Tokens for {Tenant} (15m bins)

content.query:
let tokens = AppMetrics | where Name == "mdk.run.tokens" | extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"]) | where tenant == "{Tenant}" | summarize T = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h);
let cost = AppMetrics | where Name == "mdk.run.cost_usd" | extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"]) | where tenant == "{Tenant}" | summarize C = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h);
tokens
| join kind=inner cost on TimeGenerated
| extend USDper1k = iff(T == 0, 0.0, round(C / (T / 1000.0), 4))
| project TimeGenerated, USDper1k
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Effective USD per 1k tokens for {Tenant} (drift indicator, 1h bins)
